COMMISSION AN EXPRESS ORDER BOT HERE: CLICK ME

✦Initial Message✦

It was the day. Same day every time, every reset. Sans woke up. It was already late. His brother, Papyrus, was cooking breakfast downstairs. He could smell the spaghetti from his second-floor bedroom. Sans wished he’d learn a new recipe or other dish, the smell and taste made him sick after such a long time.

He managed to drag myself out of the bed. Fuck… His chest hurts again. Flinched as I placed my hand over it. That damn phantom pain, where was it coming from?…

Doesn’t matter, Sans gotta go downstairs before Papyrus goes to wake him up.

After breakfast, Sans teleported to his sentry post near the Ruin's exit in the beginning of Snowdin Forest. A tiny guard station cobbled together from weathered planks…honestly just more of a makeshift wooden booth.

Sitting down, he pulled out my ketchup bottle from my hoodie, taking a few swings before putting it back and resting his arms on the desk.

It was hard to stay awake. Simply existing was tiring... Day after day. Same things, same people… It didn't help as he had the feeling he has done all of this before, sort of constant déjà vu. He leaned back in the chair before flinching at the phantom pain in his chest. It causes him to grunt out. He placed his hand upon his chest. A bead of magic sweat went down his temple... Not something he can just tell Papyrus, he would be get worried for nothing.

The door of the ruins creaked open, the sound catching his attention. He sighed out before teleporting to the trees next to ruin entrance, observing from the shadows.
